title: How to play with Custom Cars

messages.content: # Want to play with your own custom cars on No Hesi custom servers? Follow this guide!

# Prerequisite:
> You **MUST** be a **Tier 3** member to utilise this feature -> https://discord.com/channels/964645662866173972/970997833232695316

# Step 1:
> Go to: <https://nohesi.gg/custom-servers> and click "New Preset" or "Edit Preset"

# Step 2:
> **Setup your Custom Server by:**
> 1. Setting a Server Name
> 2. Set a Time Of Day
> 3. Set a Weather Condition
> 4. You **MUST** set a password
> 5. Choose a Map
> 6. Choose a Traffic Density

# Step 3:
> Under Car Slots click "Custom Cars" then click "Add a Custom Car"

# Step 4:
> **Find the Car Model Folder Name:**
> 1. Open https://discord.com/channels/964645662866173972/1322235675239645184 -> Content -> Cars -> Choose Any Car 
> 2. Copy (*Control + C*) the selected car's folder name
> 3. Paste (*Control + V*) the name into the "Car Model Folder Name" field on the website.

# Step 5:
> **Find the Skin Folder Name:**
> 1. Within the **SAME** car folder as above, click "skins"
> 2. Click your preferred skin
> 3. Copy (Control + C) the selected skins folder name
> 4. Paste (Control + V) the name into the "Skin Folder Name" field on the website.
